steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:9002 and wait for network idle
steps.expected: Dashboard loads with hero panel visible
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded successfully, hero panel visible at top of page

steps.action: Take annotated screenshot of the hero panel
steps.expected: 3 ring gauges labeled Agency, Nuance, Critical
steps.observed: 3 ring gauges visible: Agency (80), Nuance (3), Critical (54)

steps.action: Inspect SVG elements via DOM evaluation
steps.expected: 3 SVG ring gauge elements with aria-labels and values in [0, 100]
steps.observed: 3 SVGs with class 'risk-gauge', aria-labels 'Agency: 80', 'Nuance: 3', 'Critical: 54', each 120x78 with 6 child elements (defs + arcs)

steps.action: Check CSS animation/transition properties on gauge arcs
steps.expected: Transition or animation properties present for arc animation
steps.observed: Arc path elements have 'transition: d 0.8s' for animated arc rendering on load/data change, plus 'transition: all' on background paths

steps.action: Click 'Expand signal firehose' button at bottom of page
steps.expected: Firehose panel expands to show signal items
steps.observed: Panel expanded, class changed to 'fh-panel fh-panel--expanded', 10 article items visible

steps.action: Inspect firehose items for source labels, freshness tags, and quality indicators
steps.expected: Each item shows source badge, timestamp-derived freshness, and quality indicator
steps.observed: Each item shows: source badge (Reddit/Bluesky), freshness tag ('56m ago'/'57m ago'), quality indicator ('medium actionable'), thread title, radar name, signal count, and domain tags

steps.expected: Visual confirmation of firehose items with all required indicators
steps.observed: Screenshot confirms 10 signal items with colored source badges, MEDIUM and ACTIONABLE pill labels, freshness timestamps, and thread titles

steps.action: Scroll to Action Feed section in the μ (Local) lane
steps.expected: Action feed visible with time-bounded suggestions
steps.observed: Action Feed heading visible with '15 suggestions' count

steps.action: Inspect action feed items and time-bound labels
steps.expected: At least one action item with a time horizon label
steps.observed: 15 action items grouped into 3 time horizons: 'within 24 hours' (2 items), 'this week' (5 items), 'coordination opportunity' (8 items). Each item has title, time label, probability, evidence references, radar name, and urgency percentage.

steps.action: Take screenshot of the action feed
steps.expected: Visual confirmation of time-bounded action items
steps.observed: Screenshot shows 'WITHIN 24 HOURS' and 'THIS WEEK' section headers with action cards like 'Prepare for: ai' with 'WITHIN 24 HOURS' pill label and urgency scores

steps.action: Search source code for empty state component in threat-radar-web/src/
steps.expected: An EmptyState component exists that renders when no radars are present
steps.observed: EmptyState component found in src/ui/App.tsx (line 116-159) with data-testid='dashboard-empty-state'

steps.action: Verify conditional rendering logic in App.tsx
steps.expected: EmptyState renders when tiles.length === 0 and not loading and no error

steps.action: Verify EmptyState content provides helpful guidance
steps.expected: Informative message with instructions for creating radars
steps.observed: Component renders: 'Welcome to Mission Control' heading, description paragraph, and 3 numbered setup steps (1: radar_create, 2: radar_collect_bluesky/reddit, 3: radar_reduce_live). Also includes SVG clock icon.

steps.action: Verify CSS styles for empty state
steps.expected: Styled empty state with proper layout
steps.observed: CSS class 'dashboard-empty-state' defined in styles.css (line 1582+) with centered flex layout, min-height 50vh, proper typography and color settings

steps.action: Verify unit tests exist for empty state
steps.observed: Tests in FirehosePanel.test.tsx verify 'dashboard-empty-state' renders correctly; MuLane.test.tsx tests mu-empty-state; EtaLane.test.tsx tests eta lane empty state

evidence.consoleErrors: N/A (code review — empty state cannot be triggered via browser with 20+ radars seeded)

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-UI-002 confirmed 3 animated ring gauges (Agency:80, Nuance:3, Critical:54) with CSS transitions. VAL-UI-004 confirmed 10 firehose signals with source badges, freshness tags, and quality indicators. VAL-UI-007 confirmed 15 action feed suggestions grouped by time horizons (within 24 hours, this week, coordination opportunity). VAL-ERR-001 confirmed via code review that EmptyState component exists and renders helpful onboarding guidance when no radars are present.
